name: Magic Mind - Mental Performance Shots
description_html: Magic Mind is a daily mental performance shot with a proprietary blend of clinically-backed nootropics, adaptogens, vitamins and functional mushrooms designed to give you a sharper mind, calm energy, and less stress.

name: Magic Mind FREE | Welcome
description_html: Experience a sharper mind, calm energy, and less stress at any time of day. Powered by our proprietary blend of nootropics and adaptogens, with no caffeine or sugar.

name: Magic Mind MAXX | Welcome
description_html:
Magic Mind is a daily mental performance shot with a proprietary blend of clinically-backed nootropics, adaptogens, vitamins and functional mushrooms designed to give you a sharper mind, calm energy, and less stress.

Experience 6+ hrs of sustained flow and mental performance, with no crash. Fueled by 165mg of time-release caffeine (about one large cup of coffee) and our highest dose of nootropics, unique to our MAXX formula.

name: Magic Mind Original | Welcome
description_html: A mental performance shot infused with nootropics, adaptogens, and vitamins designed to crush procrastination, brain fog, & fatigue.

description_html:
Magic Mind is a daily mental performance shot with a proprietary blend of clinically-backed nootropics, adaptogens, vitamins and functional mushrooms designed to give you a sharper mind, calm energy, and less stress.

Magic Mind FREE is our unique formula free of caffeine and added sugar. Choose our FREE formula if you're sensitive to caffeine, want evening clarity, or prefer stimulant-free solutions.

name: Shipping Protection
description_html: For replacing lost, stolen, and damaged packages.

name: The Carhartt Work Jacket
description_html:
The Carhartt “Detroit” jacket is an icon of workwear, and we reimagined it as a timeless layer for everyday life and ritual. Each piece was patched and embroidered by seamstresses in Helena, Montana, giving it a local handprint that ties it back to our community. The embroidery and patches carry Magic Mind’s symbols: waves, birds, and mountains, alongside our mantra, “Do More. Stress Less.” This jacket embodies the heart of our brand and invites others to connect with it in a special, limited-edition piece. Built for grit, yes, but also for the softer side of fall: the early mornings when you zip it up before the sun rises, or the late nights when the chill sets in and you’re working late. Every scuff and every fray adds to its story.

• 12-ounce, firm-hand, 100% ring-spun cotton

• Wind Fighter technology tames wind

• Blanket-lined body for warmth

• Quilted nylon sleeve lining for easy on-and-off

• Left chest pocket with zipper closure

• Two interior pockets + Two lower-front pockets

• Carhartt-strong, triple-stitched main seams

• Relaxed, unisex fit

name: The Expo Tote
description_html:
The Expo Tote made its debut at Expo West 2024, where the first 300 disappeared in under an hour. When we returned in 2025 with 1,000 totes, they vanished by the end of day one.

Since then, we’ve received countless texts and emails from our Magic community of people using this tote daily for workouts, farmers market runs, beach days, and everything in between. It is just the right size, sturdy enough to haul, and stylish enough to take anywhere. And for the first time ever, we’re giving non-Expo-go’ers a chance to snag one. An ode to when Magic Mind first met the wider world, and the spirit of keeping that energy going.

name: The Golden Hour Scarf
description_html:
The Golden Hour Scarf's oversized plaid weave shifts color like light at dusk, echoing the gradient that has become a symbol of Magic Mind. Each label was sewn on by hand by a friend of the brand who doubles as a seamstress, grounding the piece in the community where our story began. The scarf is long enough to drape, wrap, or share, moving with you from coffee runs to beach walks to nights on the porch. Cozy without being heavy, vibrant without trying too hard, and more than just warmth, it is about carrying that golden-hour feeling with you, wherever the day takes you.

Limited quantities available. Once we sell out, we sell out!

• 9.88 oz gradient plaid scarf

• 90 inches in length and 15 inches wide, finished with 6-inch tassel-trim on both ends

• Hand-embroidered label

• 100% polyester

• Care instructions: hand wash in cold water, hang dry, can be ironed at low temperature.

name: The Magic Mind Mental Performance Starter Set
description_html: The Magic Mind Mental Performance Starter Set includes three 5-packs of our most-loved formulas: Original, MAXX, and Sleep. It also comes with a recommended trial sequence to help you discover which Magic Mind formulas work best for you.

name: The Moment Candle Set
description_html:
“...it takes twenty minutes to quiet the machine motor of the mind."

Jack Kerouac, letter to Allen Ginsberg 


Twenty minutes is meaningful. That’s the burn time of each honey-scented beeswax candle; long enough to mark a journal session, a meditation, or a meal without your phone. Each holder is hand-shaped, hand-painted, and hand-stamped with our Magic Mind bird logo by a small-batch female artist based in the United Kingdom.

name: The OG Crewneck
description_html:
This sweatshirt was one of the first branded pieces we ever made, built back when the Magic Mind team was just two people trying to figure it out in LA. It quickly became the field uniform: worn at events, tradeshows, and anywhere we needed to show up with something that felt like us.


For the past six years, every time we’ve seen William (our CEO), he’s wearing this sweatshirt. Designed before the team grew, it has been with us since the very beginning; a nod to where it all started.


Screen-printed design, illustrated in-house by the Magic Mind team.

name: The OG Dad Cap - Grey
description_html: The Dad Hat was one of our earliest branded pieces. A relic of our early days. We initially printed less than a dozen, and they quickly became one of the most coveted items among the Magic Mind team. Vintage in feel and laid-back by design, it is made from soft cotton twill with a subtle washed finish. The low-profile silhouette and adjustable strap make it classic, easy, and perfectly worn-in, built to be part of your everyday.

name: The OG Dad Cap - Maroon
description_html: The Dad Hat was one of our earliest branded pieces. A relic of our early days. We initially printed less than a dozen, and they quickly became one of the most coveted items among the Magic Mind team. Vintage in feel and laid-back by design, it is made from soft cotton twill with a subtle washed finish. The low-profile silhouette and adjustable strap make it classic, easy, and perfectly worn-in, built to be part of your everyday.

name: The OG Tee
description_html:
The OG Tee is part of our founder-designed collection and represents the roots of Magic Mind. Screen printed on the front and back, this tee is lightweight, breathable, and soft enough to live in. It’s built for work, rest, and everything in between.


Screen-printed design, illustrated in-house by the Magic Mind team.

name: The OG Trucker
description_html: The OG Trucker hat was designed to be the kind of piece you don’t have to think twice about. We wanted something easy — a hat you could get dirty, wash at home, and throw back on without a second thought. The 5-panel foam build and crisp embroidered wave logo give it structure, but its real purpose is simplicity. It’s the hat we reach for after surf sessions, yoga, or just running around, made to live in.

name: WK - Open App - 90 Days
description_html: Discover the benefits of daily breathwork, movement, and meditation — all in one app.
